text_block_list.text:
One day in February, I head to my office just like
usual, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Finally. I've been waiting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you better get eating now or it'll go bad
before you can finish it.
I look to where Narita Brian is pointing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Right? I mean, it's fine if people want to give me
chocolates, but I wish they wouldn't do it all at
once.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Let's start with the ones closest to their expiration
dates.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch! You think I'm going to let you weasel out of
your duties?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Here, take a look at this card.

At Narita Brian's insistence, I look at the message
card attached to one of the boxes.

text_block_list.name: Message Card
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Narita Brian,
I want to be just like you! You look so cool when
you run!"

text_block_list.name: Message Card
text_block_list.text:
"I also want to give my sincerest thanks to your
trainer for always supporting you. You two really
are the best combo!"

text_block_list.name: Message Card
text_block_list.text:
"I hope both of you will accept this chocolate as a
token of my appreciation!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This chocolate is for me and you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So, are you ready?

And so, we get started on the mountain of
chocolate...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Do we really have to eat chocolate again tomorrow?
choice_data_list: We gotta make sure we eat it all, though.
We gotta make sure we eat it all, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Of course. We can't be disrespectful.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My mom and sister are both very strict about this
kind of thing. They told me never to snub a show
of kindness.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This one isn't for the both of us. This one is just
for you.

I open the package to find three small chocolates
I often see in convenience stores.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Make sure you eat them all.

Narita Brian looks somewhat embarrassed as she
heads back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Make sure you eat them all.
choice_data_list: What do you want in return?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Nothing. That's not why I gave them to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If you do give me something, I'll take it though.
Like I said before, that's how I do things.
choice_data_list: I'll be sure to pour my heart into it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Knowing you, there'll be enough heart in it to
give me heartburn. No amount of sugar will hide
it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And I can't imagine anyone else being able to
stomach it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...At least bring me something I like.

A few days later, I give Narita Brian some snacks
in return.
